title: 9999 stack sizes
description: everything stacks to 9999, done with four mixins!
body:
this mod changes stack sizes to nine thousand nine hundred ninety nine (9999)
it only uses four mixins! one for changing the stack text, one for changing the default max stack size and the absolute max stack size, one for making the game not crash, and one for changing containers max stack size
i dont know what else modrinth wants me to add to this description for it to be approved
